description: NBA.com is the National Basketball Association’s official web platform for league news, schedules, scores, standings, player and team information, and statistics. It also hosts developer-facing game data interfaces for live and in-progress game operations data.
summary: NBA.com exposes a public NBA Stats HTTP API surface used by nba.com/stats, plus NBA Game Operations Manager stream and REST APIs documented through its developer portal that require an issued API key.

surfaces.name: NBA Game Operations Manager Stream API
NBA Game Operations Manager REST API (In-Arena)
NBA Game Operations Manager REST API (Central)
